from azure.identity import ManagedIdentityCredential
import requests

# 🔹 Replace with your Prod Synapse workspace name
workspace_name = "poductionenv"

from azure.identity import DefaultAzureCredential
import requests

workspace_name = "poductionenv"

credential = DefaultAzureCredential()  # uses az login / VS Code / browser token
token = credential.get_token("https://dev.azuresynapse.net/.default")

headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token.token}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

publish_url = f"https://{workspace_name}.dev.azuresynapse.net/publish?api-version=2020-12-01"
response = requests.post(publish_url, headers=headers)

print(response.status_code, response.text)

# Authenticate with Synapse using Managed Identity (works inside Synapse workspace)
credential = ManagedIdentityCredential()
token = credential.get_token("https://dev.azuresynapse.net/.default")

from azure.identity import ManagedIdentityCredential
import requests

# 🔹 Replace with your Prod Synapse workspace name
workspace_name = "<your-prod-synapse-workspace-name>"

# Authenticate with Synapse using Managed Identity (works inside Synapse workspace)
credential = ManagedIdentityCredential()
token = credential.get_token("https://dev.azuresynapse.net/.default")

# Prepare headers
headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {token.token}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

# 🔹 Publish from Git branch (prod3) → Live mode
publish_url = f"https://{workspace_name}.dev.azuresynapse.net/publish?api-version=2020-12-01"
response = requests.post(publish_url, headers=headers)

# Output result
print("Status:", response.status_code)
print("Response:", response.text)

from azure.identity import ManagedIdentityCredential
import requests

# Replace with your Prod workspace name
workspace_name = "poductionenv"

# Authenticate with Managed Identity (works inside Synapse)
credential = ManagedIdentityCredential()
token = credential.get_token("https://dev.azuresynapse.net/.default")

headers = {
    "Authorization": f"Bearer {token.token}",
    "Content-Type": "application/json"
}

# Trigger publish
publish_url = f"https://{workspace_name}.dev.azuresynapse.net/publish?api-version=2020-12-01"
response = requests.post(publish_url, headers=headers)

print(response.status_code, response.text)
